nasb.text: Now the rest of the acts of Solomon and whatever he did, and his wisdom, are they not written in the book of the acts of Solomon?

esv.text: Now the rest of the acts of Solomon, and all that he did, and his wisdom, are they not written in the Book of the Acts of Solomon?

cnv.text: 所羅門其餘的事：他所行的和他的智慧，不是都寫在《所羅門記》上嗎？

ccb.text: 所罗门的其他事迹、作为和智慧都记在所罗门记上了。
